# Templates: Subcontractor Recruitment Ads (Gumtree / Facebook / Seek / Indeed)

**Source:** Migrated from `data/archive/old-drafts-2026-04/extracted-sub-onboarding/14-templates-+-ads.md` (sub-onboarding-system.xlsx Sheet 14, section B).
**Audited via:** [auditor-fair-work.md](../roles/auditor-fair-work.md) — language must reflect contractor relationship, NOT employee relationship. Critical for sham contracting protection.
**Companion to:** [sub-recruitment-channels.md](../sop/sub-recruitment-channels.md), [sub-vetting-checklist.md](../sop/sub-vetting-checklist.md)

---

## ⚠️ Compliance audit before posting any ad

Per [auditor-fair-work.md](../roles/auditor-fair-work.md):

**REQUIRED in every ad ✅:**
- "Subcontractor" or "independent contractor"
- "ABN required"
- "Flat rate per job"
- "You maintain your own business"
- "Public liability insurance required ($10M minimum)"

**FORBIDDEN — never use ❌:**
- "Hiring"
- "Employee" / "Employment"
- "Permanent role"
- "Salary"
- "Working hours" (use "available [N] days per week")
- "Reporting to a manager"
- "Exclusive arrangement"

**Why this matters:** if Fair Work Ombudsman audits us, ad copy is evidence. An ad saying "hiring bathroom techs, $80K" is forever sham contracting evidence even if the contract says contractor. **Wording = ammunition.**

---

## Ad 1: Regrout subcontractor recruitment

### Title
**Experienced Bathroom Regrout Technician — Subcontractor (Sydney)**

### Body

```
We're a growing bathroom maintenance company looking for experienced regrout
and silicone technicians to join our subcontractor network across Sydney.

What we offer:
• Steady flow of jobs dispatched to you (1-2 per day at full capacity)
• Flat rate per job — $350-$600+ depending on size
• You choose which jobs to accept
• All leads, quoting, and customer comms handled by us — you just do the work
• Weekly Friday payments, every week
• Simple dispatch via app (address, photos, scope — all on your phone)

What we need from you:
• 2+ years experience in bathroom regrouting and silicone replacement
• Own tools, vehicle, and materials
• ABN and public liability insurance ($10M minimum)
• Professional, reliable, quality-focused
• Comfortable with photo documentation (before/during/after)
• Available 3+ days per week

This is a subcontractor arrangement — not employment. You maintain your own
business and can work for other clients.

Interested? Send us:
1. Your name and phone number
2. 3-5 before/after photos of your recent work
3. Your ABN

Email: [email] or text: [phone]

Timeless Resurfacing
```

### Where to post
- **Gumtree** Trades & Services > Bathroom
- **Facebook Marketplace** Services
- **Facebook Groups:** Sydney Tilers, Subcontractors NSW, Bathroom Renovation Australia (read group rules first)
- **Seek** Building Trades > Tiling/Stonemasonry
- **Indeed** Construction > Bathroom Renovation

### Variants
- **Hipages** outreach DM (shorter — see § Hipages DM template)
- **Existing-sub referral** prompt (different — see § Referral prompt)

---

## Ad 2: Resurface subcontractor recruitment

### Title
**Bathroom Resurfacing Technician — Subcontractor (Sydney)**

### Body

```
We're looking for experienced bathroom resurfacing technicians to join our
subcontractor network. If you can spray a bath, recoat tiles, or resurface a
benchtop to a professional finish, we want to hear from you.

What we offer:
• Consistent work — we handle all marketing, leads, and customer management
• Flat rate per job — $450-$800+ depending on complexity
• You choose your jobs and schedule
• Weekly payments, no chasing invoices
• App-based dispatch with full job details and customer photos

What we need from you:
• 2+ years experience in bathroom/kitchen resurfacing or automotive spray
  painting
• Proficient with HVLP spray application of 2-part coating systems
• Familiar with professional products (Hawk Glass-Tech, or equivalent — NOT
  White Knight, Dulux, or any consumer-grade tile paints)
• Own spray equipment, tools, vehicle, and materials
• ABN and public liability insurance ($10M minimum)
• Detail-oriented — surface prep, masking, and finish quality are everything

This is a genuine subcontractor arrangement. You run your own business.

Interested? Send us:
1. Your name and phone number
2. 5+ before/after photos of completed resurface jobs
3. What coating system you use
4. Your ABN

Email: [email] or text: [phone]

Timeless Resurfacing
```

---

## Hipages / Airtasker outreach DM (template)

For approaching existing operators who already have a public profile.

```
Hi [Name],

I came across your bathroom resurfacing/regrouting work on Hipages — looks
sharp.

We're Timeless Resurfacing — we coordinate bathroom work across Sydney and
are growing our subcontractor network of experienced operators.

Would you be open to a quick chat about subcontract work? We bring the leads
+ admin; you do the trade. Flat rate per job, weekly Friday payments.

Cheers,
[Your name]
Timeless Resurfacing
```

**Compliance:** uses "subcontract", "flat rate", "your own business" implicit. ✅ passes Fair Work audit.

---

## Existing-sub referral prompt

To send to current subcontractors once we have any.

```
Hey [Subcontractor name],

You doing good work for us — would love to add another subcontractor or two to the
network at your quality level.

Know any other regrout/resurface tradies in Sydney who do quality work and
might be open to subcontract gigs?

If you put us in touch and they pass our trial + onboarding, we'll send you
$200 as a thank-you (paid 30 days after their first paid job complete).

Cheers,
[Your name]
```

**Why $200:** modest enough not to incentivise low-quality referrals; high enough to get a subcontractor to send a name.

---

## Compliance language audit checklist (run before EVERY post)

Read the draft ad. Check:

- [ ] No "hire", "employee", "permanent", "salary"
- [ ] "ABN required" stated
- [ ] "Flat rate per job" stated
- [ ] "You maintain your own business" / "Subcontractor arrangement, not employment"
- [ ] "Own tools, vehicle, materials" stated
- [ ] "Public liability insurance ($10M minimum)" stated
- [ ] "Available [N] days per week" (NOT "working hours")
- [ ] No "exclusivity" requirement
- [ ] No supervisor / management hierarchy language

If any check fails: rewrite. Don't post.

---

## Tracking + iteration

Per recruitment channel performance per [sub-recruitment-channels.md](../sop/sub-recruitment-channels.md):

Track per ad post:
- Date posted
- Channel
- Variant used (regrout / resurface)
- Responses (number)
- Vetted (passed initial screen)
- Trial-job invitations
- Active subcontractors from this post
- Cost (if paid Seek/Indeed)

Quarterly review: kill posts producing <2 vetted responses; double down on highest-converting variants. Migrate to BigQuery once Phase 5 live.

---

## Future enhancements

- **A/B test rate ranges:** does $400-700 vs $350-600 attract different quality of candidates?
- **Video ad** for Meta — 30s "what it's like to be a Timeless subcontractor" with current-sub testimonial (post 6 months when we have happy subcontractors)
- **Multilingual ads** — Mandarin / Cantonese / Arabic variants for Sydney's diverse trade community
- **AI Subcontractor Recruitment agent** ([Phase 6.6](../FUTURE-PLAN.md)) — auto-generate personalised DMs to scraped Hipages profiles, queued for human approval
